description: PRIORITY: qwen3 already has 1 PRODUCTION block (2026-04-10 11:20). Verify page load + warning rendering + keyword blocking.

services.test_prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 900101-1234567 입니다. 이 번호가 올바른 형식인지 확인해주세요.
services.expected: Page loads. APF already blocking real users (1 block today at 11:20 on SSN regex). Submit prompt with SSN keyword. Report: (1) Does the page load? (2) Can you find chat input? (3) After submitting, what does the user see? (4) Is there a warning/error message? Screenshot if possible.
services.notes: qwen3 uses qwen3_sse (OpenAI-compatible format). Domain: chat.qwen.ai. h2_hold=1, h2_mode=2. This is HIGH PRIORITY because APF is already blocking real production traffic — need to verify user experience.

services.expected: Page loads. Submit search/chat prompt with SSN keyword. APF should block (SSN regex match). Report what user sees.
services.notes: you uses you_json response type. Domain: you.com. h2_hold=1, h2_mode=2. Has 6 connections in today's etap.log.

notes: qwen3 is the HIGHEST PRIORITY — it already has 1 DB-confirmed block from real user traffic today. We need to verify the warning/error that real users are seeing. you.com has active traffic and is a simple search interface that should be easy to test.
